structure.text:
Subject: NCM-P-2025-11-21 Radian MI Removes Minimum Credit Score Requirement
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-11-21 12:09:07-07:00



ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

Radian Mortgage Insurance announced that effective immediately, the minimum credit score requirement has been removed for loans that are submitted through and meet Radian’s One Underwrite (AUS) guidelines. This aligns Radian with Fannie Mae’s recent change to remove the minimum credit score requirements when submitting loan files to Desktop Underwriter. 

 

ATTACHMENTS

*	11/10/2025 Capital Markets Announcement 

** For NOVA Home Loans Internal Distribution Only **

Contact Us:

 

Scenario Desk <mailto:Scenariodesk@novahomeloans.com>         Lock Desk <mailto:lock.desk@novahomeloans.com>         Product Department <mailto:productdept@novahomeloans.com>
